narration: Everyone's chasing a million bucks to retire. But at the standard four percent withdrawal rate, that's just forty thousand dollars a year — barely above poverty level.
visual: Large gold coin SVG springs into frame at top. '$1,000,000 THE RETIREMENT GOAL' slides in below. Then '4% WITHDRAWAL = $40,000/YEAR' fades in with scale animation. Red warning pill: 'BARELY ABOVE POVERTY LEVEL' appears at bottom.

narration: Here's the problem: the average retiree actually spends fifty-seven thousand, eight hundred dollars every single year. At that rate, your million is completely gone in just seventeen years.
visual: Light background. '$57,818/YEAR AVERAGE RETIREE SPENDING' heading. An amber savings bar slowly depletes from full to empty across the scene. Year markers below: YR 0, YR 5, YR 10, YR 17. An empty piggy bank SVG appears at the right end. Red text: 'GONE IN 17 YEARS'.

narration: Then there's the healthcare bomb. Fidelity says a retired couple needs three hundred fifteen thousand dollars just for medical costs — not counting long-term care at a hundred and eight thousand a year.
visual: Dark background. Red medical cross SVG springs in at top. Three animated bar chart bars grow upward: 'HOUSING $215K' in blue, 'FOOD & TRAVEL $230K' in purple, 'HEALTHCARE $315K' in red and tallest. Label: 'FIDELITY ESTIMATE — PER COUPLE' appears after bars peak.

narration: Now stack inflation on top. At just two and a half percent per year, your forty thousand dollar income loses forty percent of its buying power in twenty years. You're quietly going backward.
visual: Light background. Two money bag SVGs side by side. Left bag full gold: '$40,000 TODAY'. Arrow in center: '20 YEARS 2.5% INFLATION'. Right bag smaller grey: '$24,000 REAL VALUE'. Red banner slides in: 'YOU LOSE 40% WITHOUT SPENDING A DOLLAR MORE'.

narration: Run the real math and you need closer to two and a half million. Start saving at thirty — sixteen hundred a month. Wait until forty — twenty-nine hundred. One decade costs you thirteen hundred dollars every month.
visual: Dark background. Title: 'TO REACH $2.5 MILLION BY AGE 65'. Two person silhouettes with age labels. Two animated bars grow upward: amber 'START AT 30 $1,600/MO' and red 'START AT 40 $2,900/MO' taller. Bottom reveal: 'WAITING A DECADE = $1,300 MORE/MONTH'.

narration: The million-dollar retirement goal is a math problem with the wrong answer. The real number is two point five million — and every year you wait, the gap gets bigger. Follow for the numbers they never taught you.
visual: Light background. Piggy bank SVG fills with amber color from bottom to top via clip-path animation. '$2.5M NOT $1M' springs onto screen in amber. CTA text fades in: 'EVERY YEAR YOU WAIT COSTS MORE' and 'FOLLOW FOR REAL MONEY MATH'.
